'''AF-27''' was the designation<ref name="JKTCG" /> of a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="Complete Visual" /> who served as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was armed with an [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]]. Ambitious and motivated, AF-27 constantly sought opportunities to advance in [[Military rank/Legends|rank]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> He was also a natural born [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]].<ref name="JKTCG2">{{JKTCG|set=Masters of the Force|cardname=AF-27 • Quick Draw|link=http://www.decipher.com/jediknights/cardlists/mastersoftheforce/large/23af27quickdraw.html}}</ref> In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], including the [[occupation of Bespin]] that AF-27 partook in according to {{CSWECite|I|13|AF-27}}, to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> AF-27 was involved in the Imperial [[Occupation of Bespin|invasion]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|13|AF-27}}</ref> led by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]],<ref name="TESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> and was posted as a guard at [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City's]] [[Carbon-freezing chamber/Legends|carbon-freezing chamber]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
AF-27 was created for a card in the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'', released in [[2001]].<ref name="JKTCG" />
